message:
The other day, I found myself in the kitchen, attempting to whip up my famous (at least in my family) spaghetti sauce. Everything was going smoothly until I got distracted by a phone call from my sister. You know how it goes – a couple of minutes can feel like seconds when you're chatting away. Suddenly, I caught the faint whiff of something burning. 😳

Thanks to our trusty smoke alarm, I was jolted back to reality just in time to save my sauce from a total disaster! It reminded me of the importance of having working smoke alarms and being a little extra mindful when cooking. 

After that little scare, I took a moment to review our family escape plan, just in case. It felt good to check in on our safety, and honestly, it’s a small win that made me feel like I was really on top of things. 

Have you had a little win in your home prep lately? Share your stories!
